reviews.comment:
Es increible la demora que tienen para atender. No solo hay que ser simpaticos en la atencion al cliente, sino tambien eficaz y productivo.

(Translated by Google)
The wait times are unbelievable. Customer service needs to be more than just friendly; it needs to be efficient and productive.

reviews.comment:
La atención deja mucho q desear, filas d autos, solo 3 surtidores funcionando, los empleados caminando, trabaja solo uno. No t ofrecen limpieza d vidrio ni control d aceite y agua...o sea q no tardan por ese motivo.

(Translated by Google)
The service leaves much to be desired: lines of cars, only three pumps working, employees walking around, and only one working. They don't offer glass cleaning or oil and water checks... so they don't take long for that reason.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/12748059352839021938/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURCMmJUNTh3RRAB

reviews.comment:
Buena atención pero como es la única estación de servicios de la zona tiene demora, recomendado ir después de las 22

(Translated by Google)
Good service, but since it's the only gas station in the area, there are delays. It's recommended to go after 10 PM.

reviews.comment:
Me atendieron 10 puntos siempre, le bajo una estrella porque es casi imposible no tener cola de 10 minutos por lo menos y uno que vive en Bs As no está acostumbrado a esperar tanto por echar nafta

(Translated by Google)
The service was always excellent, I'm taking off one star because it's almost impossible to avoid a 10-minute wait, and someone who lives in Buenos Aires isn't used to waiting that long for gas.
